Pafos · Cyprus

Italian coffee culture, slowly poured.

Inside Casa Mokador

A few moments

The bar, the light, the small rituals of an Italian café in Pafos.

01 · 06

The Menu

Three origins, one cup.

Brazil · Colombia · Costa Rica

Roasted by Mokador in Italy. Pulled at the bar in Pafos.

Cold Coffees Hot Coffees Drinks Pastries Toast & Bowls

For the Pafos afternoon — chilled, never compromised.

05

Toast & Bowls

Slower mornings — a longer sit with something warm.

  • Oats Bowl €3.60
  • Yogurt Bowl €3.60

  • Tuna Wrap €5.80

  • Salmon Toast €5.80
  • Avocado Fried Egg €5.20
  • Ham Cheese Fried Egg €5.00

After Dark

E-Hookah

Traditional · Electronic · Modern

Casa Mokador offers both worlds. The ritual of traditional e-hookah, and the cleaner, charcoal-free experience of electronic hookah — a battery-powered heating system that vaporises flavour without combustion. Smoother draws, no smoke, no setup, and easy flavour changes mid-session.

Unwind in the lounge, choose your flavour, and let the evening slow down.

Flavours

About

An Italian café
in Pafos.

Casa Mokador is where the slow rhythm of an Italian café meets the Cyprus afternoon. The beans travel from Brazil, Colombia, and Costa Rica through Mokador’s roastery in Italy, and arrive in Pafos as a single, careful espresso pour.

Benvenuti.

We serve coffee the way it’s meant to be — standing at the bar, sitting in the sun, or unwound over an e-hookah in the evening. Stay as long as the day asks you to.

Visit

Find us in Pafos.

Address
Ayiou Kendea, Paphos 8046
Pafos, Cyprus
Phone +357 97 416 416
Hours
Monday – Sunday
6:00 - 22:00
